rawFiles.name: ../data-geography/data/localities.json
rawFiles.notes: Local canonical geography file used for reviewed transport-to-locality cross-links.

transforms: Match accepted transport records to data-geography localities by source municipality, UN/LOCODE name, and maintainer-reviewed exact or alias matches.
Leave uncertain matches such as Al Thaurah/T2 without locality IDs.
Do not infer facility-level Arabic names from locality names.
reviewNotes: Added safe administrative locality cross-links for the first transport seed. Arabic canonical names were added only for standalone locality-style transport/trade records, not for airport or terminal facility names.
